testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check FAQ tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check FAQ tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check Manuals&Docs tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check Manuals&Docs tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check Download tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check Download tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check Registration&Warranty tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check Registration&Warranty tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check ContactUs tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check ContactUs tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer, change OS and check data
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer, change OS and check data
